skills.name: Spread Shot
skills.description: Fire five arrows at once to attack enemies within range. Enemies near the attacked target receive ricochet damage.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor SkillFactor % x 5 times
AoE Attack Ratio SkillSR
Number of ricochet target: 1
Ricochet range: 50 nearby the target

skills.name: Targeted Arrow
skills.description: Aim straight at the enemy and fire multiple arrows.
skills.effect_text:
Casting Time: 1.5 seconds
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 5
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR

skills.name: Triple Arrow
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor %nlExplosion Factor CaptionRatio %
Explosion Range 30
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR

skills.name: Arrow Sprinkle
skills.description: Shoot multiple arrows up in the air to create a storm of arrows after casting. Targets in its AoE receive damage every time they are hit.
skills.effect_text:
Maximum Casting Time: 1 second
Skill Factor SkillFactor % x Number of hits
Duration : Casting Time / Maximum Casting Time x 5 seconds

skills.name: Down Fall
skills.description: Fire several arrows into the air to rain down on a single designated enemy.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 5 per CaptionRatio2 second(s)
Duration: CaptionRatio seconds

skills.name: Zenith
skills.effect_text: Mergen Skill AoE Attack Ratio + CaptionRatio

attributes.name: Spread Shot: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Spread Shot] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Targeted Arrow: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Targeted Arrow] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Triple Arrow] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

* Increases the skill factor of [Arrow Sprinkle] by 0.5% per attribute level

attributes.name: Down Fall: Enhance

* Increases the skill factor of [Down Fall] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Targeted Arrow: Quick Charge
attributes.description:
* Decreases charging time of [Targeted Arrow] by half

* Increases SP consumption by 20%

attributes.name: [Arts] Spread Shot: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Spread Shot] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Targeted Arrow: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Targeted Arrow] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Triple Arrow: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Triple Arrow] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Arrow Sprinkle: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Arrow Sprinkle] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Down Fall: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Down Fall] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: Zenith: Fire For Effect
attributes.description:
* AoE Attack Ratio increase effect removed

* Final Damage of Mergen attack skill

Increases by [12 + (skill level of Zenith * 2)]%

Skills that damage increases

- Spread Shot

- Triple Arrow

- Homing Arrow

- Arrow Sprinkle

- Down Fall

attributes.name: [Arts] Triple Arrow: Zephyr
attributes.description:
* Explosion effect removed

* When using the skill, cast 2 times at once

attributes.name: [Arts] Mergen: Continue Hunting
attributes.description:
* When hunting small and medium-size monsters with Mergen's attack skill, recover HP by 20% of HP recovery

(Cooldown: 5 seconds)

attributes.name: Homing Arrow: Shackle
attributes.description:
* [Unable to move] for 2 seconds when accurately hit on monsters other than boss

* Increases SP consumption by 30%
